ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "use_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the sale occurred */,
  "door" TEXT /* Retail location of the sale */,
  "account" TEXT /* Account associated with the sale */,
  "ext_doc_id" TEXT /* External document ID for invoice tracking */,
  "ext_doc_type" TEXT /* Type of external document */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product sold */,
  "promo_name" TEXT /* Name of any promotional offer applied */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity sold */,
  "full_price" REAL /* Total price of the sale before discounts */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the transaction */,
  "dollar_vol" REAL /* Total dollar volume of the sale after discounts */,
  "assigned_rep" TEXT /* Assigned representative overseeing the transaction */,
  "sales_rep" TEXT /* Sales representative responsible for the sale */,
  "packout" INTEGER /* Packout quantity of the product sold */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the product */,
  "flavor" TEXT /* Flavor of the product */,
  "lite" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is a lite version */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock keeping unit identifier for the product */,
  "is_sample" INTEGER /* Indicates if the transaction is for a sample product */,
  "is_promotion" INTEGER /* Indicates if the transaction is part of a promotion */,
  "fam_mapping" TEXT /* Family mapping for product categorization */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the store where the sale occurred */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the customer involved in the transaction */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount applied to the transaction */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount paid for the transaction (including tax) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used for the transaction */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_account FOREIGN KEY ("account") REFERENCES accounts ("account_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_product_name FOREIGN KEY ("product_name") REFERENCES products ("product_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_assigned_rep FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_rep") REFERENCES sales_representatives ("name")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "flavor" TEXT /* Flavor of the product */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock keeping unit identifier */,
  "lite" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is a lite version */,
  "fam_mapping" TEXT /* Family mapping for product categorization */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the category of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the brand of the product */,
  "strain" TEXT /* Strain of the cannabis product */,
  "thc_content" REAL /* THC content of the product */,
  "cbd_content" REAL /* CBD content of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_representatives" (
  "rep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the sales representative */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the representative */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the representative */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the representative */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the representative */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the representative was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the representative's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the account */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email associated with the account */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the account */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of the account (e.g., wholesale, retail) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "promo_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotional campaign */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the promotion */,
  "discount_rate" REAL /* Discount rate offered by the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the promotion was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the promotion information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product in inventory */,
  "quantity_on_hand" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product on hand */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Level at which the product should be reordered */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the store associated with the inventory */,
  "last_inventory_check" TEXT /* Date of the last inventory check */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the state record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the state record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)
